name: whity/plugin-sdk
description: Standalone plugin contract package for the Whity platform: plugin/migration interfaces, HTTP shapes, hook event constants, and the tenant-isolation conformance kit. Depends on nothing but PHP at runtime.

suggest.phpunit/phpunit: Required only to extend Whity\Sdk\Testing\TenantIsolationConformanceTestCase in a plugin's test suite (the tenant-isolation conformance kit).
